method: Purity-corrected A_FB^b with published delta_b, 10% data
description: A_FB^b extraction on 10% data using published ALEPH charge separations (hep-ex/0509008 Table 12) and MC-calibrated flavour fractions. Uses afb_c=0.0682 (published charm asymmetry). This is the PRIMARY A_FB^b method per REGRESSION_TICKET.md.
